As a TV series to study we have chosen Neon Genesis Evangelion, so it seemed appropriate to share it here. We would like it if those interested or even simply intrigued by the topic could answer the questions you find in the link below: https://forms.gle/Zx2sWEXxRN5vijNY6 Thank you <3

Article: Tv Series and Artificial Intelligence Neon Genesis Evangelion
[]: Tv Series and Artificial Intelligence - Neon Genesis Evangelion             Quote Post by misatobestcharacter » Mon Apr 24, 2023 9:36 am Hi, I'm part of a group of students who are carrying out a survey on TV series and artificial intelligence for a university project. As a TV series to study we have chosen Neon Genesis Evangelion, so it seemed appropriate to share it here. We would like it if those interested or even simply intrigued by the topic could answer the questions you find in the link below: https://forms.gle/Zx2sWEXxRN5vijNY6 Thank you <3
